title: The Sailor's Debt
description: A sailor named Garrett owes the Guild a substantial sum. He's been hiding at the Crossroads tavern. Collect the debt - by persuasion, intimidation, or taking it from his possessions.

objectives.description: Find Garrett at the Crossroads tavern
Collect the 200 gold debt (persuade, intimidate, or steal)

moral_choice.description: Garrett claims he needed the money for his sick daughter. You can forgive the debt or collect it.
moral_choice.good_option: Forgive the debt and pay it yourself
moral_choice.evil_option: Collect the debt regardless of circumstances

notes: Multiple approaches. Moral dilemma. Garrett at Crossroads tavern.
